name: Alternatives to Epic Boons
entries: You might decide to grant one of the following rewards to a 20th-level character, instead of awarding an epic boon. These two options can be awarded to a character more than once.

entries.name: Ability Score Improvement
entries: The character can increase one ability score by 2 or increase two ability scores by 1 each. The ability score can now be increased above 20, up to a maximum of 30.

entries.name: New Feat
entries: The character gains a new feat chosen by the player, but subject to your approval.
